judgeDirectives.title: Reason signal scan
judgeDirectives.prompt: Read each free-text reason and identify whether it expresses price sensitivity, preference fit, or hesitation. Return structured JSON for the configured signals.
judgeDirectives.rubric: Mark a signal true only when the reason clearly indicates that factor. Use false when the factor is absent or too ambiguous to support.

signals.label: Price sensitivity
signals.description: Whether the reason explicitly mentions cost, affordability, or price as a meaningful factor.

signals.label: Preference fit
signals.description: Whether the reason indicates the product matched or failed to match the user's tastes or personal needs.

signals.label: Hesitation
signals.description: Whether the reason shows uncertainty, doubt, or reluctance rather than a confident stance.
